mapper.select: SELECT c.user_id, c.item_id, c.amount, c.booked_date, i.name, i.manufacturer, i.category_id, i.color, i.price, i.stock, i.recommended FROM public.items_in_cart c inner join public.items i on c.item_id = i.item_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY c.user_id, c.item_id

SELECT user_id, c.item_id, amount, booked_date, name, manufacturer, category_id, color, price, stock, recommended FROM public.items_in_cart c inner join public.items i on c.item_id = i.item_id WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.user_id, c.item_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.items_in_cart (user_id, item_id, amount, booked_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemId}, #{amount}, #{bookedDate})
